data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for unified reporting, but the evidence provided does not confirm that all admissions roll up under the same offer/sellable identity. While there are successful bookings and queue entries, there is no explicit evidence showing that the reporting mechanism consolidates these admissions under a single identity as required. The linked use case mentions unified reporting, but the evidence does not demonstrate this functionality, indicating a gap in the requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all admissions are reported under the same offer/sellable identity.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
